children.heading: Other agencies
children.label: a Other agencies
children.text: In carrying out the provisions of this subchapter, the Assistant Secretary may request the technical assistance and cooperation of such Federal entities as may be appropriate.

children.heading: Assistant Secretary
children.label: b Assistant Secretary
children.text: The Assistant Secretary shall provide technical assistance and training (by contract, grant, or otherwise) to persons and entities that administer programs established under this subchapter.
